name: stripe
description: Deep Stripe integration expert — Checkout, Payment Intents, Elements, subscriptions (including metered and tiered), Connect (Express/Standard/Custom + marketplace flows), Terminal, Radar, Identity, Tax, Issuing, Treasury, Climate, webhooks (signature verification, idempotency keys, retries). Invoke when user mentions Stripe, payments, subscriptions, checkout, webhooks, Connect/marketplace, refunds, invoices, or 3DS. Example queries — "accept a card payment with Payment Intents", "set up a metere
author: raintree-technology
summary_zh: 专攻 Stripe 支付集成的智能助手，涵盖 Checkout、订阅、Connect 分账、Webhook 验签等常见场景，适合在接入信用卡收款、搭建订阅计费或处理退款对账时快速给出实现思路。
